MODULE: cosmos.core.resilience
FILE: cosmos/core/resilience.py (390 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Resilience Layer.

"I have made my device strong enough to withstand even my own incompetence!"

This module implements resilience patterns to ensure the Nexus and Agent Swarm 
remain stable under high cognitive load or external failure.

Features:
1. Circuit Breaker: Prevents cascading failu

CLASSES:
- SystemState(Enum)
- CircuitBreaker: Protects expensive operations (like LLM calls or Projection) from failing repeat
- EntropyMonitor: Monitors the semantic entropy of the agent's output.
If the agent starts repeati
  Methods: def check_hallucination(self, content: str) -> bool
- HealthMonitor: Monitors system health by running registered health checks.
Provides real-time s
  Methods: def register_check(self, name: str, check_fn: Callable[[], str])
  Methods: def unregister_check(self, name: str)
  Methods: async def check_health(self) -> 'HealthStatus'
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict
- HealthStatus: Result of a health check.
- BackupManager: Manages automatic backups of cosmos data.
Ensures data durability and recovery c
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: async def create_backup(self, label: Optional[str]=None) -> Optional[Path]
  Methods: async def restore_backup(self, backup_path: Path) -> bool
  Methods: def list_backups(self) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def get_status(self) -> dict
